resultList.dtldesc: Embark on a journey to luxurious living with this exquisite 3 BHK flat for sale in Accurate Wind Chimes, located in the coveted locale of Narsingi, Hyderabad. Boasting Vaastu compliance and an inviting east-facing orientation, this residence offers a harmonious blend of comfort and positivity.::::::::Property Specifications::::::::Boasting a generous super area of 1580 square feet, nestled within the serene environs. Situated on the top floor of a four-storeyed building, this semi-furnished abode promises a lifestyle of luxury and convenience.::::::::Step into the spacious interior, where three well-appointed bedrooms await, each accompanied by its own attached bathroom featuring modern Western fittings for your comfort and convenience. Additionally, two balconies adorn this splendid abode, with one attached to the bedroom, offering a private retreat, while the other graces the living area, providing picturesque views of the serene park below. The expansive living cum dining area offers ample space for entertaining guests and spending quality time with loved ones.::::::::The heart of the home, the modular kitchen, is equipped with all essential amenities and a piped gas connection, making meal preparation a breeze. A utility area attached to the kitchen further enhances practicality and utility. Vitrified flooring throughout the space adds a touch of elegance and durability.::::::::Facilities ::::::::This residence comes with a host of facilities to ensure a hassle-free living experience. Covered parking protects your vehicle, while round-the-clock water supply and 100% power backup guarantee uninterrupted essential services. A dedicated security guard and CCTV surveillance ensure the safety and security of residents, offering peace of mind. Residents of Accurate Wind Chimes can indulge in a range of amenities, including a sparkling swimming pool and a well-equipped gymnasium, perfect for staying active and rejuvenated.::::::::Locality ::::::::Conveniently located opposite Sri Chaitanya Junior College, this residence offers easy access to essential amenities. Within a km radius, you'll find schools, hospitals, malls and supermarkets, catering to your everyday needs. Banks and ATMs are also close by, ensuring financial convenience. Public transportation options are readily available, with buses and autos easily accessible, making commuting a breeze for residents.

resultList.dtldesc: Situated in the sought-after Moti Nagar area of Hyderabad, this 2 BHK flat in Endeco TS Heights provides a blend of comfort, convenience, and contemporary amenities in a perfect manner, making it a suitable option for those who are looking for a quality residence.::::Property Overview::::Spanning 1155 sqft of super built-up area, this flat is positioned on the 9th floor of a 10-story building, providing beautiful views of the surrounding area. The apartment is offered unfurnished, allowing you to personalize the interiors to your taste. It is a great option for anyone looking to create their dream home in a prime location.::::The flat features two large bedrooms that provide a serene haven. There are two bathrooms, one being the master bedroom-attached bathroom, and the other a shared bathroom. The bathrooms both have modern western-style fixtures and geyser points. Two balconies are appended to the bedrooms, offering a refreshing look at the surroundings. The open-plan dining and lounge area is ideal for family functions and entertaining visitors. Also, the flat has a Puja room for religious rituals. The modular kitchen has modern fittings and a connected utility space for increased functionality.::::High-quality vitrified tiles are used for flooring throughout the flat, enhancing its modern and sleek appearance. The apartment is vaastu compliant, ensuring a positive, harmonious living environment. Facing east, the flat enjoys an abundance of natural light and favorable airflow.::::Facilities::::Endeco TS Heights offers a wide range of amenities designed to ensure comfort and security for its residents. The building includes covered parking spaces, providing protection for your vehicle. With 24/7 water supply and 100% power backup, residents can enjoy uninterrupted living. Security is a top priority, with CCTV surveillance in common areas and a security guard on-site to ensure safety. The building is equipped with three lifts for easy access to all floors.::::For recreation, residents can enjoy a clubhouse, gym, and swimming pool, offering excellent opportunities for fitness and leisure.::::Location::::The property is conveniently located near key landmarks, such as Panduranga Nagar Park, perfect for morning walks and relaxation. Vijeta School is just 60 meters away, making it ideal for families with children. Maxwell Hospital is within 700 meters, providing easy access to healthcare. For shopping, Vijeeta and More Supermarket are just 150 meters away, and several banks and ATMs are within walking distance. Public transport options are plentiful, with Bharat Nagar Railway Station (1 km) and Yergatta Metro Station (2.5 km) nearby, ensuring seamless connectivity across the city.::

resultList.dtldesc: Step into a world of comfort and elegance with this beautifully maintained 3 BHK apartment located in the prime residential hub of Sector 19, Noida. Offering a perfect blend of space and functionality, this residence is designed for families who appreciate a well-connected lifestyle within a settled and green neighbourhood. With its proximity to central business districts and essential urban amenities, this property represents an outstanding opportunity for quality living in Noida.Property SpecificationsThe apartment features a well-distributed super area of approximately 1,600 sq. ft, ensuring ample room for every family member. The layout comprises three spacious bedrooms, modern bathrooms, and well-positioned balconies that offer a serene view of the surrounding landscape. As a semi-furnished unit, it includes essential woodwork and quality flooring that add to its contemporary appeal. The property is part of a mature development, roughly 5 to 10 years old, and is situated on a mid-level floor to provide a balanced mix of accessibility and privacy. Large windows allow for abundant natural light and cross-ventilation, creating a refreshing living environment throughout the year.FacilitiesThis residence is equipped with a variety of modern facilities to ensure a convenient and secure lifestyle. Residents benefit from dedicated parking space, high-speed elevators, and 24-hour water supply. The complex is protected by round-the-clock security personnel and integrated CCTV surveillance. Additionally, the building features robust power backup for common areas and a professional maintenance team to address any service requirements. The layout of the society promotes a sense of community, featuring landscaped green patches and paved walking paths for evening strolls and outdoor relaxation.LocalitySituated in Sector 19, the property enjoys one of the most strategic locations in Noida. It is positioned near major commercial centres and is just a short drive from the bustling Sector 18 market and Atta Market, providing endless shopping and dining options. The locality is well-served by top-tier schools such as Marigold Public School and renowned healthcare facilities like Max Hospital. Connectivity is a major highlight, with the Noida Sector 16 and Sector 18 Metro Stations within easy reach, facilitating a smooth commute to Delhi and Greater Noida. The neighbourhood is characterized by its wide, tree-lined roads and established infrastructure, making it a highly desirable address for families.
